field.label: Version
field.help: Display OPNsense software version.

field.label: Time
field.help: Display current system time.

field.label: Uptime
field.help: Display system uptime.

field.label: Hostname
field.help: Display system hostname.

field.label: System
field.help: Display general system information.

field.label: Disk Usage
field.help: Display disk usage statistics.

field.label: Load Averages
field.help: Display CPU load averages.

field.label: States Table
field.help: Display state table usage.

field.label: CARP Status
field.help: Display CARP (Common Address Redundancy Protocol) failover status.

field.label: IPsec Status
field.help: Display IPsec tunnel status.

field.label: Interfaces
field.help: Display interface summary.

field.label: Interface Link Status
field.help: Display detailed per-interface link status (IPv4, IPv6, MAC, link state).

field.label: Gateway Summary
field.help: Display gateway summary.

field.label: Gateway Status
field.help: Display per-gateway status (status, packet loss, delay).

field.label: Memory Buffers
field.help: Display memory buffer (mbuf) usage.

field.label: Packages
field.help: Display package installation summary.

field.label: CPU Frequency
field.help: Display current and maximum CPU frequency.

field.label: CPU Temperature
field.help: Display CPU temperature.

field.label: Temperature Unit
field.help: Temperature display unit (Celsius or Fahrenheit).

field.label: NTP Status
field.help: Display NTP synchronization status and GPS satellite info.

field.label: Traffic
field.help: Display traffic statistics for selected interface.

field.label: Traffic Interface
field.help: Select the interface for traffic display.

field.label: Top Interfaces by bps
field.help: Display top interfaces ranked by bits per second.

field.label: Top Interfaces by Total Bytes
field.help: Display top interfaces ranked by total bytes transferred.

field.label: Top Interfaces by Bytes Today
field.help: Display top interfaces ranked by bytes transferred today.

field.label: Traffic by Address
field.help: Display top hosts by bandwidth usage.

field.label: Traffic by Address Interface
field.help: Select the interface for traffic by address monitoring.

field.label: Traffic by Address Sort
field.help: Sort traffic by address results by incoming or outgoing traffic.

field.label: Traffic by Address Filter
field.help: Filter traffic by address to show local, remote, or all IPs.

field.label: Host Display Format
field.help: Display hosts by their description or IP address.

field.label: APC UPS Status
field.help: Display APC UPS status (requires apcupsd). Shows name, status, line voltage, battery charge, time left, load.

field.label: NUT UPS Status
field.help: Display NUT UPS status (requires nut). Shows UPS monitoring data.
